rationale: The citing note says it extends prior sponsored-search research that emphasized advertiser-side outcomes and keyword attributes, and the cited paper is precisely an advertiser-side paid-search model of generic/branded keyword dynamics and spillover. This is a strong thematic predecessor in the same literature (paid search, keyword-level behavior, Bayesian modeling), so it is not clearly an incidental background mention. Even without in-text citation context, the overlap is sufficient to warrant second-stage judgment.
